# messageIdentifier

**Type**

A unique identifier for a message, which you provide when you upload the message.

## Declaration

```swift
uuid messageIdentifier
```

## Discussion

You create the UUID to identify a message when you call [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/Upload-Message]. Use this identifier to refer to the same message throughout the API.

## Messages

- **messageState**: The approval state of the message.
- **body**: The body text you provide for a message.
- **header**: The header text you provide for a message.
